subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Loving One hath revealed in the Sacred House, guiding mankind unto His straight path, O concourse [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الودود فی البیت المعمور و هدی الناس الی صراطه المستقیم یا ملا
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
